DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-14-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Allyson M. Willoghby, Esq., 408-376-5194, appeared on behlaf of defendants and demurring parties Butterfields Auctioneers Corporation and Jason Baxter.

There being no appearances in opposition to the demurrer and no opposition on file the tentative ruling was adopted as the order of the court: Butterfields' and Baxter's demurrer to the First Amended Complaint is sustained with leave to amend. (JJM/KH) Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855
